January 28,
Discover How-To Get the Look: Toasty Makeup

Get the Look: Toasty Makeup

Soft. Bronzed. Effortless. Discover winter’s warmest
makeup trend and learn how to recreate the look step-by-step.

What is Toasty Makeup?

Warm-toned eyes. Bronzed skin. The soft winter glow everyone’s loving. Inspired by the warmth of cinnamon, brown sugar and caramel, Toasty Makeup is all about restoring warmth to the complexion with rich, cozy tones.

This look features:
• Soft complexion: It starts with skin that looks healthy, hydrated and naturally radiant. The goal is a warm, skin-forward base—never heavy. Think soft glow, even tone, and subtle dimension that lets your natural complexion show through.
• Bronzed skin: Bronzer or a concealer 2 shades darker than your skintone, applied to your temples, forehead, jawline and hollows of your cheeks creates a warm glow.
• Earthy blush: Bring natural warmth to the look with blush shades like copper, terracotta, cinnamon and peach.
• Soft smoky eye makeup: Eyeshadow stays subtle and blended, using warm tones such as bronze, caramel, cinnamon and brown.
• Warm-toned lips: Complete the look with nude or caramel lip shades in a glossy or satin finish.

Toasty Makeup Look Tutorial

Step 1: Start with Skin Prep

Hydration is key in preventing dry winter skin. Use a rich moisturizer like Revitalizing Supreme+ to deeply nourish skin and boost radiance. If you want extra glow, follow with a lightweight, hydrating primer like Futurist Watery Glow Primer.

Step 2: Define Your Eyes

Line the lower lash line with Double Wear Infinite Waterproof Eyeliner in Blackened Onyx. Gently smudge it out to create a soft, smoky effect that adds warmth without harshness.

Step 3: Contour + Conceal

Skip the full face of foundation for this look. Instead, choose a shade of Double Wear Concealer that’s 1-2 shades deeper than your skintone and apply it to your forehead and hollows of your cheeks. Blend softly with a brush to create warmth and subtle definition. Then, use a concealer that matches your skintone and apply to any areas that need coverage.

Step 4: Set + Blur

Lightly set your complexion with Double Wear Matte Setting Powder Veil. Focus on areas where you want to blur and smooth. The result is weightless, translucent coverage that still lets skin glow.

Step 5: Keep Eyes Soft & Warm

Using The Essential Eyeshadow Quad in Getaway, blend the rich brown satin shade through the crease with a fluffy eyeshadow brush. Keep edges diffused for a soft, effortless touch of warmth.

Step 6: Add Blush

Apply The Sculpting Blush in Hypnotic Copper to the high points of your cheekbones. This adds warmth and a pop of color to your complexion.

Step 7: Line & Plump Your Lips

Complete your Toasty Makeup look by lining your lips with Double Wear Lip Liner in 10 Chestnut. Then, top with Glossy Pout Lip Oil in 05 Hot Cocoa for a plumped, glossy finish.

Want more? Shop our makeup bestellers.

Shop the Story
